description:
All your chats in one app. Yes, really.

A single app to chat on iMessage, WhatsApp, and 13 other chat networks. You can search, snooze, or archive messages. And with a unified inbox, you’ll never miss a message again.
New

Choose 12-hour/24-hour time format in Settings > General

Fixed & Improved

Fixed jittering when a message overflows to "Show more"

Show mention indicator in chat list event when unread counts are turned off

Changing text size now correctly changes the size in the message composer as well

Zooming an image in gallery view now correctly zooms where you pinched / double-clicked

Several small UX improvements
